SEARCH
Package photos.model

Class UserManager

java.lang.Object
photos.model.UserManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class UserManager extends Object implements Serializable
Stores and manages all users in the photo application. Handles saving and loading application data using Java serialization. Implemented as a singleton so all controllers share the same instance.
See Also:

      public static final String DATA_FILE

    • SINGLE_VALUE_TAG_TYPES

      public static final List<String> SINGLE_VALUE_TAG_TYPES
      Tag types that only allow one value per photo. Checked by PhotoViewController before adding a tag.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserManager

      public UserManager()

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static UserManager getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance. Loads from disk on first call.

    • setCurrentUser

      public void setCurrentUser(User user)

    • getCurrentUser

      public User getCurrentUser()

    • getUsers

      public List<User> getUsers()

    • getUser

      public User getUser(String username)

    • addUser

      public boolean addUser(String username)
      Adds a new user by username. Rejects blank, duplicate, or reserved usernames.

    • removeUser

      public boolean removeUser(String username)
      Removes a user by username. Reserved users (admin, stock) cannot be removed.

    • ensureDefaultUsers

      public void ensureDefaultUsers()
      Ensures admin and stock users exist on startup. Populates the stock album with image files from data/.

    • save

      public void save() throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

    • load

      public static UserManager load()
      Loads UserManager from disk. Returns a new empty instance if no file exists.

    • getAllUniquePhotos

      public List<Photo> getAllUniquePhotos(User user)
      Returns all unique photos for a user across all albums. Uses object identity for deduplication since the same Photo object is shared by reference across albums.

    • searchBySingleTag

      public List<Photo> searchBySingleTag(User user, String tagName, String tagValue)

    • searchByTwoTagsAnd

      public List<Photo> searchByTwoTagsAnd(User user, String tagName1, String tagValue1, String tagName2, String tagValue2)

    • searchByTwoTagsOr

      public List<Photo> searchByTwoTagsOr(User user, String tagName1, String tagValue1, String tagName2, String tagValue2)

    • searchByDate

      public List<Photo> searchByDate(User user, Calendar start, Calendar end)
